creator: matthew@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi, Mirko,

Just checking on open PRs and I realised there hadn't been any updates
on this PR for too long.

Is this still a problem for you?  There had been some work going on
about creating a separate www/mod_php5 port, which I think was probably
related to the problems you had.  However, that mod_php5 port has been
in the tree for a while now and seems to be working fine, judging by the
absence of complaints.

	Cheers,

	Matthew

-- 
Dr Matthew J Seaman MA, D.Phil.
PGP: http://www.infracaninophile.co.uk/pgpkey
